findings.title: App Service layout
findings.detail: Front-door pattern keeps Azure App Service behind Azure Front Door with HTTPS-only listeners and health probes.

findings.title: Secrets posture
findings.detail: Application settings pull connection strings from Key Vault references; no plaintext secrets in configuration.

findings.title: Observability
findings.detail: Application Insights ties request flows to dependency calls and exports availability tests for the public HTTPS endpoint.

findings.title: DR evidence
findings.detail: Runbooks mention quarterly failover drills but lack automated links to test results.
